title: Looking for Real Estate Agent at NoBroker

jsonLd.title: Looking for Real Estate Agent at NoBroker
jsonLd.description:
NoBroker has an exciting opening for a Real Estate Agent at our Jodhpur office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About NoBroker:
NoBroker is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Negotiate pricing, terms, and conditions on behalf of clients
• Provide advisory services on property investment and market trends
• Conduct land acquisition due diligence and feasibility studies
• Liaise with banks and NBFCs for home loan assistance to customers
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software
• Build relationships with channel partners and brokers
• Manage RERA documentation and compliance requirements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Negotiation Skills
• Proficiency in Lease Administration
• Proficiency in GIS Tools
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in RERA Compliance

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Life and accident insurance
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Referral bonus program
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Jodhpur, Rajasthan, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with NoBroker!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
